items.title: The Milwaukee Bucks have agreed to sign 2025 second-round pick Kam Jones on a two-way NBA deal, sources tell ESPN. Jones was traded from Indiana to Chicago on draft night before being released, and now joins the Bucks.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: The Milwaukee Bucks have agreed to sign 2025 second-round pick Kam Jones on a two-way NBA deal, sources tell ESPN. Jones was traded from Indiana to Chicago on draft night before being released, and now joins the Bucks.

items.title: The Milwaukee Bucks and Kam Jones have agreed to a two-way deal, league sources told HoopsHype. Jones was the 38th pick of the 2025 NBA Draft. Agent Kevin Bradbury of LIFT Sports Management worked with the Bucks to land Jones in Milwaukee.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Milwaukee Bucks and Kam Jones have agreed to a two-way deal, league sources told HoopsHype. Jones was the 38th pick of the 2025 NBA Draft. Agent Kevin Bradbury of LIFT Sports Management worked with the Bucks to land Jones in Milwaukee.

items.title: Of note: Pacers literally could not have offered/signed Oubre to this contract without trading away Kam Jones' contract on draft night because of the first apron hard cap. That was an important move.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Of note: Pacers literally could not have offered/signed Oubre to this contract without trading away Kam Jones' contract on draft night because of the first apron hard cap. That was an important move.

items.title: Kam Jones was waived by the Bulls yesterday (June 30).
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Kam Jones was waived by the Bulls yesterday (June 30).

Barring something unexpected Cam Christie, Kris Dunn, Kyle Filipowski, Leonard Miller and Svi Mykhailiuk all saw their deals become fully guaranteed.

items.title: Nudge the Bulls cap space projection up to $23.7M after the Kam Jones waiver.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Nudge the Bulls cap space projection up to $23.7M after the Kam Jones waiver.

Chicago could waive-and-stretch Jones to create even more cap space, but we'll leave his $1.1M guarantee whole for now until we know for sure.

items.title: Kam Jones waived, no picks gained in the transaction (just second round swaps), and the roster spot point isn't viable because the offseason limit is 20 players. They sold a high second-round pick for cash at the start of a rebuild, again. This is just what the Bulls do.
items.author: Ricky O'Donnell
items.body_excerpt: Kam Jones waived, no picks gained in the transaction (just second round swaps), and the roster spot point isn't viable because the offseason limit is 20 players. They sold a high second-round pick for cash at the start of a rebuild, again. This is just what the Bulls do.

items.title: The Bulls waived guard Kam Jones, who the Pacers dealt to Chicago to acquire the 38th pick — and select Braden Smith.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
The Bulls waived guard Kam Jones, who the Pacers dealt to Chicago to acquire the 38th pick — and select Braden Smith.

Half of his $2.1M salary was guaranteed; and the rest became guaranteed after today.

www.fieldhousefiles.com/p/1on1-kam-j...

media.title: Kam Jones on Pacers exit: ‘That’s just the business of the NBA’
media.description: One year after the Pacers traded up to draft him, Jones was dealt to Chicago as Indiana again moved into the 38th pick — this time to select Purdue guard Braden Smith.

items.title: The Chicago Bulls plan to waive Kam Jones, league sources told HoopsHype. Jones had a deadline today that would’ve fully guaranteed his salary at $2.15 million. He was the 38th pick in the 2025 NBA Draft by the Indiana Pacers and was traded to Chicago on draft night.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Chicago Bulls plan to waive Kam Jones, league sources told HoopsHype. Jones had a deadline today that would’ve fully guaranteed his salary at $2.15 million. He was the 38th pick in the 2025 NBA Draft by the Indiana Pacers and was traded to Chicago on draft night.

items.title: Kam Jones spent night one of the NBA Draft with Pacers season-ticket holders. Less than 24 hours later, he was suddenly traded to the Bulls.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Kam Jones spent night one of the NBA Draft with Pacers season-ticket holders. Less than 24 hours later, he was suddenly traded to the Bulls.

I caught up with the former Pacer on Sunday.

items.title: 1-on-1 with Kam Jones: On being traded after one year with the Pacers
items.author: Fieldhouse Files
items.body_excerpt: Kam Jones shooting a free throw for The Untouchables, captained by Gary McGhee. One week ago, Kam Jones was reminiscing about his draft night. The Marquette University product was taken 38th overall in the 2025 NBA Draft by the Pacers , who traded up with the San Antonio Spurs…

items.title: My guy @dustindopirak.bsky.social was first on Twitter, but can confirm that the Bulls received Kam Jones, cash and 2028 + 2030 2nd round swaps in the deal with Indiana for the 38th pick. Bulls traded out of the second round tonight entirely.
items.author: Joel Lorenzi
items.body_excerpt: My guy @dustindopirak.bsky.social was first on Twitter, but can confirm that the Bulls received Kam Jones, cash and 2028 + 2030 2nd round swaps in the deal with Indiana for the 38th pick. Bulls traded out of the second round tonight entirely.

items.author: Sports Illustrated
items.body_excerpt: Pacers Trade Kam Jones for No. 38 Pick, Select Braden Smith Sports Illustrated

items.title: If you've listened to Locked On Pacers this week, you learned my thoughts on why I thought it would be hard for the Pacers to roster an early 2nd-round pick this year AND Kam Jones. That they were able to use Jones to get the pick + save some salary along the way is a good trade.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: If you've listened to Locked On Pacers this week, you learned my thoughts on why I thought it would be hard for the Pacers to roster an early 2nd-round pick this year AND Kam Jones. That they were able to use Jones to get the pick + save some salary along the way is a good trade.

items.title: Braden Smith taking Kam Jones roster spot is key given that Indiana doesn't have many free agent spots. Could be needed with Tyrese Haliburton coming back from injury and TJ McConnell turning 34 next season.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: Braden Smith taking Kam Jones roster spot is key given that Indiana doesn't have many free agent spots. Could be needed with Tyrese Haliburton coming back from injury and TJ McConnell turning 34 next season.

items.title: The Pacers trade two second round pick swaps, cash considerations, and Kam Jones to the Chicago Bulls for pick number 38, I'm told. They took Purdue's Braden Smith.

items.body_excerpt: The Pacers trade two second round pick swaps, cash considerations, and Kam Jones to the Chicago Bulls for pick number 38, I'm told. They took Purdue's Braden Smith.
